name: foodnear.me Services
description: AI-native restaurant discovery services and APIs

item.name: Restaurant Search API
item.description: Three-tier restaurant search: verified → menu_indexed → discovered. Returns verification_status and menu_available on each result.

item.name: Restaurant Profile API
item.description: Retrieve detailed restaurant profiles with Schema.org/Restaurant JSON-LD markup and Menu Protocol extensions including ADO scores and verification status.

item.name: Menu Protocol API
item.description: Get full restaurant menus in Menu Protocol v1.0 format with explicit dietary flags, allergen arrays, customization options, and cryptographic owner approval signatures.

item.name: MCP Server
item.description: Model Context Protocol server for native integration with Claude, ChatGPT, and other LLM-based AI agents. Provides tools for restaurant search, menu retrieval, and ADO scoring.

item.name: ADO Audit
item.description: Free Agent Discovery Optimization audit for restaurants. Analyze your menu data quality, get an ADO score breakdown, and receive actionable recommendations to improve AI agent discoverability.

item.name: Menu Protocol Validation
item.description: Validate your restaurant menu data against the Menu Protocol v1.0 specification. Ensure compliance for optimal AI agent integration.
